apps.name: Lethe
apps.description: Persistent memory layer for AI agents. Gives your agent long-term memory across sessions.

apps.name: Ollama
apps.description: Self-hosted AI model runner. Run Llama, Mistral, and other open-source AI models locally.

apps.name: Open WebUI
apps.description: User-friendly WebUI for AI models. Chat with Ollama and other LLMs through a clean, open source interface.

apps.name: Grafana
apps.description: Analytics and monitoring solution. Visualize metrics, logs, and traces in customizable dashboards.

apps.name: Umami
apps.description: Simple, fast, privacy-focused web analytics. Track page views and visitor behavior without using Google Analytics.

apps.name: Prowlarr
apps.description: Indexer manager and proxy for your Arr stack. Manages all your indexers in one place.

apps.name: Radarr
apps.description: Movie collection manager for Usenet and BitTorrent users. Automatically finds and downloads movies.

apps.name: Sonarr
apps.description: Smart PVR for newsgroup and bittorrent users. Automatically downloads TV shows via Usenet or BitTorrent.

apps.name: Calibre-Web
apps.description: Modern web UI for Calibre e-book server. Access and read your ebook library from any device.

apps.name: Filebrowser
apps.description: Self-hosted file manager with a web interface. Upload, download, and manage files on your server through a clean UI.

apps.name: Nextcloud
apps.description: Self-hosted productivity platform. File sync, share, calendar, contacts, tasks, and more — all under your control.

apps.name: Puter
apps.description: Self-hosted cloud operating system. A full desktop environment in your browser with files, apps, and more.

apps.name: OpenClaw
apps.description: AI-native container management platform. Control Docker containers through natural language, Slack, Discord, Telegram, and more.

apps.name: Portainer
apps.description: Docker container management UI. Manage containers, images, volumes, and networks through a clean web interface.

apps.name: Watchtower
apps.description: Automatic container updates. Monitors your Docker containers and automatically updates them when new images are available.

apps.name: InfluxDB
apps.description: Time series database. Store and query time series data for monitoring and analytics.

apps.name: Supabase
apps.description: Self-hosted Firebase alternative. Database, auth, storage, and real-time APIs for your apps.

apps.name: Minecraft Server
apps.description: Minecraft Java Edition Server. Host your own multiplayer Minecraft world.

apps.name: Windows (Docker)
apps.description: Run Windows in Docker. A complete Windows 10/11 environment in your browser via noVNC.

apps.name: Home Assistant
apps.description: Open source home automation platform focused on privacy and local control.

apps.name: Audiobookshelf
apps.description: Self-hosted audiobook and podcast server. Stream your audiobooks with progress tracking across all your devices.

apps.name: Bazarr
apps.description: Subtitle download manager for your Arr stack. Automatically finds and downloads subtitles for movies and TV shows.

apps.name: Castopod
apps.description: Self-hosted podcast hosting platform. Publish, distribute, and monetize your podcast with built-in analytics.

apps.name: Jellyfin
apps.description: The free software media system. Stream your media to any device with no fees and no tracking.

apps.name: Komga
apps.description: Media server for comics and ebooks. Browse, read, and organize your comic (CBZ/CBR) and ebook (EPUB) library.

apps.name: Lidarr
apps.description: Usenet and BitTorrent music collection manager. Automatically downloads and organizes your music.

apps.name: Plex Media Server
apps.description: Stream your media anywhere. Organize and stream your movies, TV shows, music, and photos to any device.

apps.name: Readarr
apps.description: Usenet and BitTorrent ebook collection manager. Automatically downloads and organizes your ebooks.

apps.name: Glances
apps.description: Cross-platform system monitoring tool. Monitor CPU, memory, disk, network, and processes in real-time.

apps.name: Prometheus
apps.description: Monitoring system and time series database. Collects and stores metrics from configured targets.

apps.name: Uptime Kuma
apps.description: Self-hosted monitoring tool. Monitor your servers and services with a beautiful dashboard.

apps.name: AdGuard Home
apps.description: Network-wide ad blocker with DNS customization. Similar to Pi-hole with a modern web interface.

apps.name: Adguard-Home
apps.description: Network-wide DNS-level ad blocking and parental controls. Blocks ads and trackers across your entire network.

apps.name: Nginx
apps.description: Web server and reverse proxy. Serve websites and route traffic to your Docker containers with SSL support.

apps.name: Pi-hole
apps.description: Network-wide ad blocking. Block ads on your entire network at the DNS level.

apps.name: Traefik
apps.description: Modern reverse proxy and load balancer. Automatically routes traffic to your containers with automatic SSL via Let's Encrypt.

apps.name: Freshrss
apps.description: Self-hosted RSS/Atom feed reader. Subscribe to feeds and read them in a clean, customizable interface.

apps.name: Novu
apps.description: Open source notification infrastructure. Send transactional emails, SMS, push, and in-app notifications from a single API.

apps.name: Ntfy
apps.description: Send push notifications to your phone or desktop from anywhere. Self-hosted notify-at-the-command-line service.

apps.name: Immich
apps.description: Self-hosted photo and video backup solution. Automatically backs up your photos and videos from your phone to your server.

apps.name: Bookstack
apps.description: Platform for storing and organizing information. Create a wiki, documentation, or knowledge base with a clean book-and-page structure.

apps.name: Outline
apps.description: Fast, collaborative wiki for teams. Beautiful documentation that makes it easy to share knowledge.

apps.name: Outline-Wiki
apps.description: Fast, collaborative wiki for teams. Beautiful documentation with real-time editing and powerful search.

apps.name: Plane
apps.description: Open source project management platform. Track issues, sprints, and roadmaps for your team without enterprise pricing.

apps.name: n8n
apps.description: Workflow automation tool. Automate tasks between apps with a visual workflow editor.

apps.name: Jackett
apps.description: API support for torrent trackers. Translates queries from Sonarr/Radarr to tracker-specific queries.

apps.name: Vaultwarden
apps.description: Bitwarden compatible password manager. Self-hosted alternative to Bitwarden, written in Rust.

apps.name: Nzbget
apps.description: Optimized Usenet downloader. Fast and efficient NZB download client with a lightweight web interface.

apps.name: Transmission
apps.description: Lightweight BitTorrent client. Simple, efficient, and cross-platform torrent downloading.

apps.name: qBittorrent
apps.description: Free and open-source BitTorrent client. Feature-rich alternative to Transmission with a modern web UI.

apps.name: Homarr
apps.description: Sleek homepage dashboard for your server. Organize your services, monitor status, and access everything from one place.

apps.name: Paperless-Ngx
apps.description: Document management system. Scan, index, and archive your paper documents with full-text search across all PDFs.

apps.name: RSSHub
apps.description: Open source RSS feed generator. Generate RSS feeds from websites that don't have them.

apps.name: Shlink
apps.description: Self-hosted URL shortener with statistics and tracking. Create branded short links and track clicks.

apps.name: Syncthing
apps.description: Decentralized file synchronization. Keep files in sync between devices without storing data on a third-party server.

apps.name: Web-Check
apps.description: All-in-one website recon and analysis tool. Check SSL, DNS, headers, cookies, and 100+ other metrics for any website.

apps.name: Gluetun
apps.description: VPN container for routing Docker services through WireGuard or OpenVPN. Run any container's traffic through a VPN.

apps.name: WireGuard
apps.description: Fast and secure VPN. Modern VPN protocol with simple setup and excellent performance.
